title: sm-conformance Common Definitions
description: Shared definitions referenced via $ref from the conformance-envelope schema.

didKey.description: did:key identifier per the W3C did:key method (multibase base58btc over multicodec 0xed01 || Ed25519 pubkey32). The leading 'z' indicates base58btc.

base64Ed25519Signature.description: Base64-encoded 64-byte Ed25519 signature with padding (88 chars total).

sha256Hash.description: SHA-256 hash with the 'sha256:' prefix and lowercase hex digest.

extensionsObject.description: Forward-compatible additions. Keys MUST be namespace-prefixed (<domain>.<sub>.<field>).
